posting.sourceTitle: JATC for Tile, Marble, Terrazzo BAC LU #7
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee (JATC) for Tile, Marble and Terrazzo BAC, Local Union #7 of NY & NJ
posting.unionName: BAC, Local Union #7 of NY & NJ
posting.locationSummary: Long Island City, NY area; works in New York and New Jersey
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person at the International Masonry Institute on the listed dates. Applications must be completed and the exam taken the same day; no admittance after 8:30 a.m. and no mail applications are accepted.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: International Masonry Institute, 12-07 44th Avenue, Long Island City, NY 11101
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or general equivalency diploma (GED/TASC).
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school. The union operates in New York and New Jersey.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must take and pass a drug test, at the sponsor's expense, after an offer of employment.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or general equivalency diploma (such as a TASC or GED).
Must have reliable means of transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school. The Union operates in New York and New Jersey states.
Must take a Basic Assessment Skills Exam and score a minimum of 23 out of 31 on the exam.
Must take and pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after an offer of employment.

Must sign an affidavit agreeing they are physically capable of performing the essential functions of the trade without posing a threat to the health or safety of themselves or others. Functions may include working with hand tools and power tools; exposure to loud noise, hazardous machinery, hazardous voltages and respiratory irritants; prolonged standing, climbing, walking, repeated squatting, stretching and bending; work under extreme weather conditions in summer and winter months; work in confined areas where movement is greatly limited; lifting and moving heavy supplies and equipment up to 100 pounds; and working from ladders, scaffolds, and personnel lifts, which may exceed 100 feet.
Must provide DD-214 Form 214, Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty, if applicable, after selection and prior to enrollment.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18+, have a high school diploma or GED/TASC, pass a skills exam, have reliable transportation, and be able to meet physical and drug-testing requirements.
posting.contactName: Tile, Marble and Terrazzo BAC, Local Union #7 of NY & NJ
posting.contactSummary: For more information, contact Tile, Marble and Terrazzo BAC, Local Union #7 of NY & NJ at (718) 706-9294.
